Home / Service Areas / Evanston

Kitchen-remodel in Evanston, IL

Trusted local professionals serving Evanston and surrounding communities

Serving Evanston, IL

Evanston’s historic homes, many dating from the 1890s to the 1930s, require a delicate touch when remodeling kitchens. Horizon Kitchen Remodel respects the architectural integrity of these properties while introducing modern amenities and energy-efficient upgrades. Given the city’s cold winters, we focus on insulation and heating solutions to keep your kitchen warm and inviting.

Evanston is home to historic properties near Northwestern University, blending vintage charm with academic vibrancy.

Kitchen-remodel Services in Evanston

Custom Cabinetry

Handcrafted storage solutions designed for Chicago's unique home layouts.

Quartz Countertops

Durable surfaces that resist Chicago's extreme temperature changes.

Historic Kitchen Restoration

Preserving Chicago's architectural heritage while adding modern functionality.

Integrating technology seamlessly into Chicago's diverse home styles.

Learn more →

Accessible Kitchen Design

Creating kitchens that adapt to Chicago's multigenerational households.

Learn more →
